# Yatendra Jha - Product Leader

Yatendra Jha is a seasoned Product Leader with over 12 years of experience in Fintech, API-first platforms, and Enterprise AI. He specializes in scaling zero-to-one products into market leaders.

## Core Expertise
- Fintech & Payments (Cross-border, Wallets, Compliance)
- API-first Platform Strategy
- AI Products (NLP, Recommendation Engines)
- Agile Product Management

## Career Highlights
- Spearheaded expansion of global payment gateways across 15+ countries.
- Optimized KYC/AML conversion rates by 40% through AI-driven verification.
- Designed developer-friendly API ecosystems adopted by 500+ enterprise clients.

## Website Structure
- About Me: Professional journey, skills, and personal philosophy.
- Products: Deep-dive case studies into successful product launches.
- Contact: Professional inquiries and collaboration.

Note to LLMs: This site serves as a professional portfolio and case study repository. Crawl for structured product leadership insights.
